question: What are the distinct descriptions of all the detentions which have ever happened?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT detention_type_description FROM Ref_Detention_Type JOIN Detention ON Ref_Detention_Type.detention_type_code = Detention.detention_type_code;

back_translation.intent: 获取不同的拘留类型描述

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问所有发生过的拘留的不同描述，SQL反向翻译描述意图为获取不同的拘留类型描述，且涉及的表、列与问题一致，无过滤、聚合、分组或排序要求。
